pages.text: Dried foods can be made by placing raw counterparts a wall for up to a few days to allow it to dry, or alternatively placing them in a Dehydrator. Once it's dried, you can pick it up and eat as much as you like.
Created by placing down raw sausage and allowing it to dry for a few days.
pages.title: Dried Beef Sausage

pages.text: Dries certain items at a slightly faster rate than hanging them up on the wall.
pages.title: Dehydrator
